seo.title: Supabase Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Supabase analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Backend-as-a-Service.

lock_in.explanation: Low — PostgreSQL under tofrom, open-source, standard SQL

when_to_use: Need PostgreSQL with auth + storage + realtime
Firebase alternative with SQL and lower lock-in
when_not_to_use: Need offline-first mobile sync — consider Firebase
Need reactive queries without polling — consider Convex
Enterprise requiring 99.99% SLA — consider managed Postgres (Neon, RDS)

migration_cheatsheet.risk_notes: Low — PostgreSQL under tofrom, open-source, standard SQL

review.verdict: Best for postgresql with auth + storage + realtime. Supabase offers freemium, paid from $25/mo (Pro). Low vendor lock-in.
pros: Firebase alternative with SQL and lower lock-in
Low lock-in — easy to migrate away
cons: Limited customization for complex business logic
review.best_for: Need PostgreSQL with auth + storage + realtime
